title: Extended Slabs +
description: This mod adds a vertical slab variant for each slab in Vanilla Minecraft and some select mods.
body:
Extended Slabs

This mod adds a vertical slab variant for each slab in Vanilla Minecraft and some select mods.
The recipe is simple, just add the slab you want to use in the crafting grid and get a vertical slab, it's a 1 to 1.

1.13 and 1.14 versions available at Extended Slabs
 

Original Creator

This mod was originally created by Thinkverse and was discontinued as mentioned on the first versions mod page: Extended Slabs.
Thinkverse gave permission for people to fork the mod and release their versions.

FAQ and Updates

Updates

1.16.4 - v1.4.0

- Updated to 1.16.4
- Added Corners for Biomes O' Plenty wooden planks.
- Added Podzol and Path Slabs and Vertical Slabs.
- Added Vertical Slabs for other Biomes O' Plenty slabs.
- Added Netherrack and Endstone Stairs, Slabs, Corners and Vertical Slabs.
- Added more Vertical Slabs such as Bricks and Blackstone.

1.15.2 - v1.2.0
- Added Vertical Slabs for Biomes O' Plenty wooden planks.
- Fixed a major crash when starting a server with the mod.
- Changed the look of the Creative Tab.
- Changed the versioning from 'v1.0' to 'v1.2.0'.
 

FAQ:

Can I suggest a feature?
You can suggest a feature on my Discord.
Can I use this mod in my modpack?
Yes, just link to this page and give me a heads up!
Can I do a mod review on it?
I mean it is just Vertical Slabs but sure
Will more blocks get slabs?
Yes.
What mods are supported?
- Vanilla Minecraft
- Biomes O' Plenty
